# Attio Brand Guidelines

> Comprehensive brand guidelines and design system documentation for Attio. This resource provides all visual identity specifications including logo usage, color palette, typography, spacing, component library, and design principles.

## Brand Identity

Attio is a modern CRM platform designed for tech-savvy professionals. The brand identity reflects a clean, professional, and accessible design language.

## Logo

- Primary logo: Attio wordmark
- Minimum size: 48px width for digital
- Clear space: 2x the height of the logomark around all sides
- File formats: SVG for web, PNG for social and print
- Available in light and dark variations

## Color Palette

### Brand Colors
- Primary: #B5BDC9 (HSL 216, 14%, 75%) — Used for backgrounds and subtle accents
- Accent: #202124 (HSL 220, 6%, 13%) — Used for buttons, headings, and emphasis
- Background: #FFFFFF — Page backgrounds and content areas
- Text Primary: #1C1D1F — Main body text and headings
- Link: #505967 — Links, secondary text, and supporting elements

### Extended Palette (Slate)
- Slate 50: #F8F9FA
- Slate 100: #EEF0F3
- Slate 200: #D8DCE2
- Slate 300: #B5BDC9
- Slate 400: #8C95A5
- Slate 500: #505967
- Slate 600: #3A4250
- Slate 700: #2A3140
- Slate 800: #202124
- Slate 900: #1C1D1F

## Typography

- Primary typeface: Inter (body and headings)
- Monospace typeface: JetBrains Mono (code blocks)
- Display: 64px / semibold / line-height 1.1 / tracking -0.02em
- Heading 1: 48px / semibold / line-height 1.15
- Heading 2: 36px / semibold / line-height 1.2
- Heading 3: 28px / semibold / line-height 1.25
- Body Large: 18px / regular / line-height 1.6
- Body: 16px / regular / line-height 1.6
- Body Small: 14px / regular / line-height 1.5
- Caption: 12px / medium / line-height 1.4

## Spacing

Base unit: 8px grid system
- 2xs: 4px (0.5x)
- xs: 8px (1x)
- sm: 12px (1.5x)
- md: 16px (2x)
- lg: 24px (3x)
- xl: 32px (4x)
- 2xl: 48px (6x)
- 3xl: 64px (8x)
- 4xl: 96px (12x)

## Components

### Primary Button
- Background: #202124
- Text: #F3F4F6
- Border: #505967
- Border radius: 10px

### Secondary Button
- Background: #FAFAFB
- Text: #232529
- Border radius: 0px

### Border Radius
- Default: 8px
- Buttons: 10px
- Small elements: 6px
- Cards: 12-16px

## Design Principles

1. Hierarchy — Use size, weight, and color to create clear visual hierarchy
2. Consistency — Stick to 8px spacing grid, no arbitrary values
3. Restraint — Less is more, let content breathe with generous whitespace
4. Accessibility — All text must meet WCAG AA contrast requirements
